youtube_ss_Id:
Now, please upload the screenshot of your YouTube history, only for the last 15 minutes. Please pay attention to not include other information in your screenshot such as videos watched prior to this experiment, other tabs or identifying information related to your google account.



To find your YouTube history, you can click on this link. After clicking, your YouTube history will open. Please scroll down, so that your screen only shows the the header that says ‘Today’, and your history of the last 15 minutes including the names of the videos and the times they are watched. For example, if it’s currently 9:32, the last video you watched should have started roughly at 9:17 or after a couple of minutes after that. If your history does not fit in a single screenshot, you can send more than one screenshot to capture all of your history for the last 15 minutes.



If you don’t know how to take a screenshot, you can follow these instructions depending on your computer: macOS; Windows; Linux.



Note: You will not receive payment if you fail to show evidence that you used YouTube. Please make sure you contain the "today" heading in the screenshot, as well as the names of the videos and the time they are watched. If your history does not fit in a single screenshot, you can send multiple screenshots by compressing your screenshots into a zip file. If you are not sure how to compress files into zip, you can follow these instructions depending on your computer: macOS; Windows; Linux. - Id
